positive: A detailed watercolor illustration of exotic tropical foliage, including monstera leaves, hibiscus flowers, and ferns, arranged in a symmetrical botanical wreath. Soft pastel color palette, high resolution, delicate linework, natural light, art by Beatrix Potter and Alphonse Mucha.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, harsh lines
